title: Create Chronical - Rise of Civilization
description: Rise of Civilization is a Minecraft modpack focused on building and managing a growing civilization from scratch.
body:
# **"Create Chronical - Rise of Civilization"** 

Invites you to an unparalleled experience of building and managing a civilization, growing from humble beginnings to an advanced society rooted in automation and ingenuity. Created especially for those who love city-building, intricate technologies, and automated systems, this modpack utilizes the power of the Create Mod and its expansions to transform Minecraft into a true world of invention and progress.

This modpack combines a rich selection of mods that enable a continuous journey of growth and challenges. From the start, **Geolosys** provides a realistic distribution of natural resources, while advanced automation systems in **Create Deco, Create Enchantment Industry, Create Steam 'n' Rails**, and others empower you to shape a mechanized civilization.

**For building enthusiasts**, mods like **Chisels & Bits** and **Macaw’s Roofs** offer tools to craft detailed and stylish buildings, while **Structurize** and** Minecolonies** enable village construction and NPC worker management, bringing a dynamic civilization experience. Across the diverse biomes introduced by **Oh The Biomes We've Gone** and **Biomes O’ Plenty**, each exploration unveils new lands for expansion and development.

**For fans of technology and automation**, the suite of mods including **Create Crafts & Additions, Create Jetpack, Create: Extended Cogwheels,** and **Create: New Age** allow the creation of unique machinery and complex systems. These are complemented by **Tom's Simple Storage** and **Traveler’s Backpack**, which facilitate resource management as you build your civilization through various stages.

**Visual enhancements and optimizations** such as **Complementary Shaders - Unbound, Pastel Shaders**, and performance mods like **ImmediatelyFast** and **Oculus** ensure a smooth, visually stunning experience that brings a vibrant world to life. **Just Enough Items (JEI)** and **Jade** help manage recipes and item information, allowing you to keep your focus on growth.

In "**Rise of Civilization**", you’ll experience the journey of a civilization advancing through innovation and exploration. This modpack is a tribute to the passion for creating societies, where every gear and every structure tells the story of a growing empire. It’s time to see how far your imagination and management skills can take your civilization!

# **Copyright Notice**

All mods included in the Create Chronical - Rise of Civilization modpack are the intellectual property of their respective creators. We have obtained permissions or adhered to licensing terms for each mod utilized in this project. Full credit is attributed to each mod author for their invaluable work, which has greatly contributed to the Minecraft community and to the enhancement of this modpack’s experience.

Each mod remains the property of its respective owner, and we do not claim ownership or authorship of any mods included. For details on individual mods, their creators, and licenses, please visit the official Modrinth or CurseForge pages for each mod, or consult the permissions documentation within the modpack.

If there are any concerns regarding the use of specific mods in this modpack, please contact us, and we will address the issue promptly.

Thank you to all the talented mod creators for their dedication and contribution!

Create Chronical - Rise of Civilization
